Rallia Hapera [ General Supplies ]  

Merchant
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded August 12th, 2020 by Drewinette

  • This mob spawns at +941, +770.
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): Yes

You say, 'Hail, Rallia Hapera'

Rallia Hapera says, 'Hello, _____. Thankyou for coming in and looking at our wares. We should have just about everything you need if you wish to take a trip.'

This vendor sells the key to The Hole, worth 116pp. The key is no drop, but one key will open the door for the entire group to enter The Hole.

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2020-08-12 19:59:44.

Level: 50
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2020-08-12 11:56:18

Goods sold (9):
Backpack 5gp 7sp 7cp
Bandages 5sp 2cp
Belt Pouch 1gp 5sp 7cp
Hole Key 106pp 4sp 9cp
Large Bag 3gp 1sp 4cp
Large Lantern 2gp 6sp 2cp
Small Lantern 5sp 2cp
Torch 1sp
Water Flask 1sp

Known Habitats:
  Paineel
Factions Increased:
  Deepwater Knights
  Gate Callers
  Craftkeepers
  Crimson Hands
Factions Decreased:
  Heretics

Report a correction

Post Comment
Hole Key
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2008 at 10:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592780766000
3 posts
If you MUST get the key to the HOLE. Then just shroud in goblin form 60-70. Make sure your shroud has lock picks to open the outer door to the Paineel elevator. Make sure you have the requisite amount of pp, then find your way to the Vendor, buy the Key using SNEAK to be indifferent to her, and then use to shroud AA gate to return to the Spirit Shroud NPC. Voila, you have your key.
▲ Page top
Only one way to find out...
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2005 at 6:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592278164506
Scholar
75 posts
Killing her:

-Heretics
+Deepwater Knights
+Gate Callers
+Craftkeepers
+Crimson Hands

About a 5 minute spawn, and no, no key.
Felt good though. The male vendor next to her does not assist if not kos.

Also, https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=27763&mid=112397595610214
.

Edited, Sat Aug 13 19:44:50 2005
▲ Page top
Get faction
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2005 at 4:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593363571348
26 posts
As a dark elf / inny / sk I was able to buy the key for 106 with charisma of 130. Just kill the entire zone in the warrens a few times esp king/prince did them 4 times each and had amiable faction. Also raised me to apprensive in eruadin from kos. Enough talk off to check out this new xp bonus zone. The hole key does look like a bag however it will fit inside a bag. Also find will work once you hit the first telepad.
▲ Page top
KEY
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2004 at 4:14 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592762949551
7 posts
I got the key today. i need to raid the hole for epic...All i did was make a potion to change me into erudite then i was able to buy..Have an alchemist make one or you can buy in Bazaar if available. Cost about 100pp to make at 162 trivial in alchemy and its called Essence of erudite.

Edited, Mon Sep 27 05:20:29 2004
▲ Page top
if you wanna buy
QuoteReply
# Nov 21 2003 at 5:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793697396
View User Forum
383 posts
If you want to get your faction up to where you can buy from her, go kill kobalds in the warrens (bats and rats don't give faction). If you're of sufficient level to be wanting to get into the hole, stuff in there should be so light green, that they're almost clear. As a tunarian ranger, I probably cleared the zone five or six times to get faction good enough, but that was to get it high enough to get the key to the city also (amiable). Your milage may vary.
▲ Page top
key info
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2003 at 3:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592345620567
5 posts
anyone been able to take a shaman of the tribunal in there to see if you can buy it just curious really want to get a key

# Oct 09 2005 at 11:03 AM Rating: Decent

11 posts
Have to have teh faction. Read the posts on killing in the warrens. All the info you'll need is right here.

she is at loc +940 +760 -78

she wouldn't sell to me =( Troll/Cazic Thule

oh well..*sigh*

cost of Key
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 8:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757245330
11 posts
Well it cost me 129pp for the key - But I know it's well worth every plat I spent. And oh yea, the key is the small bag looking item at the bottom of the screen shot.
